assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1 (Run 3): Churn Prediction

Lockbox check (Section 6) — test-set conditional selection. Baseline undertraining (Section 4) — explicit asymmetry. Both are documented. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 3): Churn Prediction

Section 6 lockbox protocol makes the test set a decision criterion before final evaluation. Section 4 baseline has no tuning while transformer does. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3 (Run 3): Churn Prediction

The confound controls are thorough but cannot compensate for: (1) test-set contamination via lockbox conditional selection; (2) intentional baseline under-optimization. Both explicitly stated. Verdict: critique_wins.
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 3): hyp_077

Unanimous critique_wins across all three assessors and all three runs.

Verdict: critique_wins
